posts.text: The job of the politicians is to rob us. The donors pay for the robbery. And the media covers it up. It’s the perfect heist. #GreatAmericanRobbery
Is everyone else also exhausted of Trump’s lies? Today he said, “We have nobody even shooting at us.” Earlier in the day, Iran shot down one of our F-35s.

Of course, it will be American ground troops ordered in by Netanyahu, not Israeli troops. American media refuses to even acknowledge the possibility that Israeli troops could be used instead. They think its antisemitic if you object to Americans dying for Israel. Know your place!

Here we go. Once Netanyahu has ordered in ground troops, then it's a guarantee. American politicians are not allowed to disagree. Watch. You'll see Trump will follow his orders like a dog. Then they'll pretend landing troops on Iranian islands doesn't count. Propaganda incoming.


Furkan Gözükara (@FurkanGozukara)

BOMBSHELL! Netanyahu just casually admitted on live TV that there will be a GROUND INVASION of Iran. The air strikes were just the beginning of a massive, devastating regional war.

V

One of our F-35s got hit over Iran. Thank God the pilot is safe. Those planes cost $100 million. USS Gerald Ford had a huge fire a week ago that took 30 hours to put out. That's the type of thing that happens when you're deployed for twice the length you're supposed to be.

Israel is running our military into the ground for their wars. All of the bullshitters in DC told us that this war would be easy, quick and cheap. Now, they're asking for $200 billion. Let alone all the cost of all our downed

Kent was the Director of National Counterterrorism. The type of person our media told us we have to listen to every time. My guess is now they'll tell us it's unacceptable to listen to him. Why would our counterterrorism unit be told to stand down? That is incredibly unusual.

Joe Kent says that an investigation that had leads on Charlie Kirk's death was shut down. If he's telling the truth, that is a MASSIVE problem. We don't know what that investigation would have found, but why on earth would our own government shut that down? What do they know?

Obviously, this happens because they bribed all our politicians. And our media will call you antisemite if you even dare to ask questions about why we owe Israel any money or allegiance. They’ll say if you don’t hand over your wallet to Israel, you’re an antisemite!

We have to borrow money from China to give to Israel. Then you and your children have to pay the interest on that debt for the rest of your lives. Why don’t the Israelis borrow the money from the Chinese, instead of making us borrow it and then hand it to them?

I also guarantee you that if they need Democratic votes, they'll get exactly the number of votes they need. Because people in Washington are 100% full of shit. And the media that covers them is even more full of shit. It's a game they're playing on us. And yes, it's a robbery.

You should be absolutely furious about this $200 billion ask for the war. I guarantee you if you asked for $200 billion in health care or food for American people, you'd be laughed out of Congress. There's no money for that! But as soon as Israel asks, it'll fly through Congress.

And now they come asking for $200 billion for Israel's war. Why doesn't our special ally pay for the war? They're the ones who wanted it. Why do we have to pay all of Israel's bills and fight all their wars? And at home, we're always told we don't have enough for American people.

The Israelis bombed the Iranian gas fields without our permission. They knew it would drive up gas prices Americans have to pay, but they did it anyway. Because they never listen to anyone else, or care about anyone but themselves. With allies like this, you don't need enemies.

Joe Kent conveniently under investigation now. @TuckerCarlson potentially under investigation. We've moved on from the propaganda portion of our programming to outright oppression. National media will pretend it's a total coincidence that opponents of the war are being targeted.

Left-wing partisans love that poll, too. Because they can say that all Trump voters are hypocrites, they all love war, they were all lying. They want to be able to say they're in a cult. So, everyone saying they're disappointed in Trump is a mirage? None of them exist? Absurd.

I generally like @ForecasterEnten, but that segment on the biggest bullshit poll of all time was unacceptable - and disingenuous framing. An NBC poll asked people who still call themselves MAGA if they like Trump, and they all said yes. Of course!! That's circular logic. What he didn't tell you was that half of Republicans who no longer call themselves MAGA are against the war. 

Unfortunately, there's a reason for this framing. It's to encourage Trump - don't worry, MAGA hasn't broken with you!

And don't take a couple of days to check back in with Tel Aviv and have them workshop a new piece of propaganda. It's a very easy question. If you don't answer, everyone will know it's because you rather have American troops killed then your precious Israeli soldiers.

I asked Israeli ass kisser @benfergusonshow on @PiersUncensored if we should send American or Israeli troops, if we're going to use ground troops. As I expected, he refused to answer. So, @benshapiro @marklevinshow @LauraLoomer - American or Israeli ground troops?

Israel attacking Iran's oil fields is completely against our interests. Not only will it increase oil prices, something US has said many time we don't want, but it will also lead to Iran bombing oil fields of Gulf countries. Double the disaster. Israel is the worst "ally" ever.
